2605.02366.title: A Compound AI Agent for Conversational Grant Discovery
2605.02366.paper_summary: Research funding discovery remains fundamentally fragmented: researchers navigate disparate agency portals (e.g., in the United States, NSF, NIH, DARPA, Grants.gov, and many others) with heterogeneous interfaces, search capabilities, and data schemas. We present a compound AI system that unifies this landscape through two tightly coupled components: (1) an aggregation layer that autonomously collects, normalizes, and indexes almost 12,000 federal and nonprofit opportunities from fragmented sources via LLM-equipped browser agents, maintaining a biweekly-updated unified database; and (2) an agentic ReAct-based query processing layer that interprets research context (including from PDF documents) and employs hybrid search combining a structured index with selective web search to retrieve relevant opportunities - while avoiding LLM hallucination. The conversational interface supports iterative refinement through multi-turn interactions, allowing researchers to progressively apply constraints without reformulating their core research description. Results stream in real time with full transparency of intermediate reasoning, enabling appropriate calibration of user trust. Currently used by almost 3,000+ users, our approach demonstrates the feasibility of compound AI in reducing grant discovery time from 30--45 minutes (manual, fragmented portal searches) to under 10 minutes (unified, conversational search).
2605.02366.paper_summary_zh: 研究資金的發現仍然基本上是分散的：研究人員在不同的機構入口網站（例如，在美國，NSF、NIH、DARPA、Grants.gov等）中導航，這些網站具有異質的介面、搜索能力和數據架構。我們提出了一個複合AI系統，通過兩個緊密耦合的組件統一這一領域：（1）一個聚合層，自動收集、標準化和索引來自分散來源的近12,000個聯邦和非營利機會，通過配備LLM的瀏覽器代理，維護一個每兩周更新的統一數據庫；（2）一個基於ReAct的代理查詢處理層，詮釋研究背景（包括來自PDF文件的背景），並採用混合搜索，結合結構化索引與選擇性網絡搜索，以檢索相關機會——同時避免LLM的幻覺。對話介面支持通過多輪互動進行迭代精煉，允許研究人員逐步應用約束，而無需重新表述其核心研究描述。結果實時流入，並對中間推理的透明度保持充分，從而能夠適當調整用戶信任。目前，幾乎有3,000多名用戶在使用我們的方法，顯示出複合AI在將資助發現時間從30-45分鐘（手動、分散的入口網站搜索）減少到10分鐘以內（統一的、對話式搜索）方面的可行性。
2605.02366.author: Zhisheng Tang et.al.
